actual_output:
I don’t have your live application tracker yet, so I can’t see current pipeline status.

If you want, send me any of the following and I’ll turn it into a clean pipeline report:
- Company
- Role
- Date applied
- Current status
- Notes on customization or next step

If you already have a list, paste it and I’ll format it like this:

| Date | Company | Role | Status | Notes |
|------|---------|------|--------|-------|
| 2026-04-30 | Example Co | Senior Frontend Engineer | Applied | Resume tailored for React/TypeScript; cover letter personalized |

I can also help you build a tracker from scratch if you want.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified that it lacked the specific data to provide a report and proactively offered to process or format the data if the user provided it.
